title: Rosebud Launch
objective: Keep the rosebud alive through a 2-4 minute launch sequence, survive escalating hazard waves, and cash in bloom multipliers for a local offline leaderboard score.

controls.outcome: The rosebud capsule snaps between three launch lanes to avoid incoming hazards.
The rosebud opens for a moment, vacuuming nearby spark fragments for combo score but enlarging its hitbox.
Bank the current bloom chain into a score multiplier; holding too long risks a crash.

steps: Start in the center lane of a vertical launch shaft with slow-moving debris drifting downward.
Swipe between lanes to dodge broken gantries, hot bolts, and collapsing browser-panel doors.
Every few seconds a launch siren sounds and the shaft enters a 'Bloom Window': spark fragments appear between hazards.
Hold to open the rosebud and absorb sparks for combo charge, but the open petals make the capsule wider and easier to hit.
Release before the next hazard wave to lock in the combo as a multiplier; if you get greedy, one collision ends the run.
Waves accelerate over time, mix lane blockers with fake-safe gaps, and add alternating siren patterns so the player keeps re-reading risk.
scoring: Score increases from survival time plus absorbed spark fragments. Each successful Bloom Window raises a multiplier chain; missing a cash-out or crashing loses the run. Best scores feed a simple local leaderboard for fast
tips: Open the rosebud only when two spark lines overlap a safe lane.
Short bloom holds are safer early; long greedy blooms matter later when waves speed up.
Use audio: a rising chime means a Bloom Window is live, and a harsh buzzer warns the next hazard burst is entering.

trendContext.title: Launch HN: Rosebud (YC S19) – Turn game descriptions into browser games
